description: Minimal schema for data.npolar.no metadata format. Used to validate metadata creation

workspace.description: Top level grouping of the data

collection.description: Data collection. (gps, image, radar, ctd, etc...)

created.description: Date-time when the metadata was created in ISO 8601 format

updated.description: Date-time when the metadata was updated in ISO 8601 format

editors.description: Array containing a list of persons who changed the metadata and the date when. Last Person in the Array is DIF:Personnel[Role] DIF_Author
